sn1.7:1.1: At Sāvatthī. Standing to one side, that devata recited this verse in the presence of the Blessed One:
sn1.7:2.1: v.11"Those who have not penetrated things,Who may be led into others’ doctrines,Fast asleep, they have not yet awakened:It is time for them to awaken."
sn1.7:3.1: v.12"Those who have penetrated things well,Who cannot be led into others’ doctrines,Those awakened ones, having rightly known,Fare evenly amidst the uneven."
